---
title: "02_pf_sf_central_federated_analysis"
author: "Chad H. Hochberg"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

```{r Project Location and Sites}
project_location <- '~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-JohnsHopkins/Research Projects/CLIF/CLIF_Projects/CLIF_PF-to-SF/federated_summary_analysis'

#Which Sites Participated
sites <- c("hopkins", "penn")

if (!dir.exists(paste0(project_location, "/tables"))) {
  dir.create(paste0(project_location, "/tables"))
}
if (!dir.exists(paste0(project_location, "/graphs"))) {
  dir.create(paste0(project_location, "/graphs"))
}
```


```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)

#Install Following Libraries For this Project
packages_to_install =
  c("tidyverse",
    "tidytable",
    "data.table",
    "collapse",
    "tableone",
    "viridis",
    "sandwich",
    "caret",
    "scales",
    "glmmTMB",
    "broom.mixed",
    "marginaleffects",
    "pROC",
    "rms")

#Can Load For Each Individual RMarkdown
packages_to_load =
  c(
    "tidyverse",
    "tidytable",
    "data.table",
    "collapse",
    "tableone",
    "viridis",
    "sandwich",
    "caret",
    "scales",
    "broom.mixed",
    "glmmTMB",
    "pROC",
    "rms",
    "marginaleffects")
options(dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE)

fn_install_if_mi = function(p) {
  if (!requireNamespace(p, quietly = TRUE)) {
    try(install.packages(p, dependencies = TRUE), silent = TRUE)
  }
}

fn_load_quiet = function(p) {
  suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(p, character.only = TRUE))
}

invisible(lapply(packages_to_install, fn_install_if_mi))
invisible(lapply(packages_to_load,   fn_load_quiet))
options(dplyr.summarise.inform = FALSE)
rm(packages_to_install, packages_to_load, fn_install_if_mi, fn_load_quiet); gc()

#Use Dplyr functions as default
filter <- dplyr::filter
mutate <- dplyr::mutate
select <- dplyr::select
arrange <- dplyr::arrange
group_by <- dplyr::group_by
summarise <- dplyr::summarise
lead <- dplyr::lead
lag <- dplyr::lag
coalesce <- dplyr::coalesce
n <- dplyr::n
```

```{r Prepare to Load Tables Into List}
#List of tables without site name to expext
tables <- c(
  "_arf_per_quarter_hospital.csv",
  "_arf_per_quarter.csv",
  "_aggregate_outcomes.csv",
  "_aggregate_by_o2cat_hospital.csv",
  "_aggregate_by_o2cat_resp_support.csv",
  "_aggregate_by_o2cat_race.csv",
  "_aggregate_by_o2cat.csv",
  "_aggregate_hours_to_measure.csv",
  "_consort_data.csv",
  "_pf_sf_summary_table.csv",  
  "_pf_sf_count_table.csv",
  "_proportional_odds_models.csv",
  "_sofa_missing.csv",                          
  "_table_agreement.csv",                       
  "_table1_cat_by_exposure_high_flow_nc.csv",  
  "_table1_cat_by_exposure_imv.csv",           
  "_table1_cat_by_exposure_nippv.csv", 
  "_table1_cat_by_exposure_high_flow_ncno_undefined.csv",  
  "_table1_cat_by_exposure_imvno_undefined.csv",           
  "_table1_cat_by_exposure_nippvno_undefined.csv", 
  "_table1_cat_by_exposure.csv",                
  "_table1_cat_by_oxygenation.csv",            
  "_table1_cat_by_sofa2.csv",                   
  "_table1_cont_by_exposure_high_flow_nc.csv", 
  "_table1_cont_by_exposure_imv.csv",          
  "_table1_cont_by_exposure_nippv.csv",   
  "_table1_cont_by_exposure_high_flow_ncno_undefined.csv", 
  "_table1_cont_by_exposure_imv.csvno_undefined",          
  "_table1_cont_by_exposure_nippvno_undefined.csv",   
  "_table1_cont_by_exposure.csv",               
  "_table1_cont_by_oxygenation.csv",           
  "_table1_cont_by_sofa2.csv",                  
  "_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_exposure.csv",    
  "_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_hospital_id.csv",  
  "_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_oxygenation.csv",  
  "_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_resp_support.csv", 
  "_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_resp_support_noundefined.csv", 
  "_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_sofa.csv",
  "_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_exposure.csv",    
  "_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_hospital_id.csv",  
  "_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_oxygenation.csv",  
  "_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_resp_support.csv", 
  "_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_resp_support_noundefined.csv", 
  "_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_sofa.csv"
)

# Combine sites and tables to create full table names
site_tables <- as.vector(outer(sites, tables, paste, sep = ""))
```

```{r Open Tables for CSV and RDS}
# Create an empty list to store data frames
site_table_data <- list()

# Loop through each site and each table name
for (site in sites) {
  # Construct the directory path for the current site
  site_directory <- file.path(paste0(project_location,'/site_data/',site,'/proj_output/'))  

  for (table_name in tables) {
    # Construct the full file path for the CSV
    file_path <- file.path(site_directory, paste0(site, table_name))
    
    # Check if the file exists before reading
    if (file.exists(file_path)) {
      # Use a combined key of site and table name to store the data frame in the list
      site_table_data[[paste(site,table_name, sep="")]] <- fread(file_path)
    } else {
      message(paste("File not found:", file_path))
    }
  }
}

## Repeat for RDS
contingency_list <- list()
# Loop through each site
for (site in sites) {
  # List all files in the specified directory
  filenames <- list.files(paste0(project_location,'/site_data/',site,'/proj_output/'))
  
  # Loop through each filename
  for (filename in filenames) {
    # Check if the file is a CSV and not the "graphs" file
    if (grepl("\\.rds$", filename) && filename != "graphs") {
      # Read the CSV file into a data frame
      data <- read_rds(paste0(project_location,'/site_data/',site,'/proj_output/', filename))
      
      # Extract the base name without the extension to use as list key
      name_key <- tools::file_path_sans_ext(filename)
      
      # Assign the data frame to the list using site as prefix
      contingency_list[[name_key]] <- data
    } 
  } 
}

combine_lists <- function(data_list, table_name) {
  # Create a placeholder for combined data
  combined_table <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(data_list), function(name) {
    x <- data_list[[name]]  # Access the list element by name
    if (!is.null(x[[table_name]])) {
      # Extract the data frame
      df <- x[[table_name]]
      
      # Extract the site name from the list name
      site_name <- strsplit(name, "_")[[1]][1]  # Get the part before the underscore
      
      # Create a new column for the site
      df$site <- site_name
      
      return(df)
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
  }))
  
  return(combined_table)
}
```


```{r Collate Data Function}
# Function to extract and collate specified tables from the site_table_data list
#This Will Only Work with Tables with the Same Number of Columns
collate_tables <- function(table_suffix) {
  # Extract only data frames that match the pattern "[SITE]_table_suffix"
  table_list <- lapply(sites, function(site) {
    # Construct the key to extract the correct data frame
    table_name <- paste(site, table_suffix, sep = "")
    
    if (table_name %in% names(site_table_data)) {
      # Add the 'site' column and return the modified data frame
      df <- site_table_data[[table_name]]
      df$site <- site
      return(df)
    } else {
      message(paste("Table not found for site:", site))
      return(NULL)  # Return NULL if the table isn't found
    }
  })
  
  # Filter out NULL elements (sites that didn't have the table)
  table_list <- Filter(Negate(is.null), table_list)
  
  # Combine all data frames into one using rbind
  combined_table <- do.call(rbind, table_list)
  
  return(combined_table)
}

combine_lists <- function(data_list, table_name) {
  # Create a placeholder for combined data
  combined_table <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(data_list), function(name) {
    x <- data_list[[name]]  # Access the list element by name
    if (!is.null(x[[table_name]])) {
      # Extract the data frame
      df <- x[[table_name]]
      
   # Extract the site name from the list name
      site_name <- strsplit(name, "_")[[1]][1]  # Get the part before the underscore
      
   # Create a new column for the site
      df$site <- site_name
      
      return(df)
    } else {
      return(NULL)
    }
  }))
  rownames(combined_table) <- NULL
  return(combined_table)
}

```


```{r Pool Data for Consort Diagram}
consort_table <- collate_tables('_consort_data.csv') |>
  group_by(site) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  group_by(step) |>
  summarise(
    included=sum(included, na.rm=T),
    excluded=sum(excluded, na.rm=T),
    rn=max(rn)
  ) |>
  ungroup() |>
  arrange(rn)
```



```{r Summary Data and Master Table 1}
#For Purposes of this Study Will Use Exposure metric (PF defined vs SF Defined)

table1_cat <- collate_tables("_table1_cat_by_exposure.csv")
table1_cont <- collate_tables("_table1_cont_by_exposure.csv")
table_o2_hospital_cont <- collate_tables("_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_hospital_id.csv")
table_o2_hospital_cat <- collate_tables("_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_hospital_id.csv")

#Determine Total N for Patients Represented, Total CLIF Sites and Total Hospitals
N_aggregate <- table1_cat |> 
  group_by(site) |>
  summarise(
    n_site=max(n)
  ) |>
  mutate(
    N_aggregate=sum(n_site, na.rm=T),
    n_sites=max(dplyr::row_number())) |>
  select(N_aggregate, n_sites)

hospitals <- combine_lists(contingency_list, 'oxygenation_category_hospital_id') |>
  mutate(hospital_id=sub("^[^_]*_", "", hospital_id)) |>
  distinct(site, hospital_id) |>
  filter(hospital_id!='NA',
        !is.na(hospital_id))

N_aggregate <- N_aggregate |>
  mutate(n_hospitals=length(unique(hospitals$hospital_id)))
cat('\n Total Number of Patients, CLIF Sites, and Hospitals')
print(N_aggregate)

#Now Aggregate Categorical Variables For Table 1
aggregate_table1_cat <- table1_cat |>
  #Combine to SF, PF or Undefined
  mutate(
    strata=fcase(
      strata %in% 'sf_only', 'sf',
      strata %in% c('pf_only', 'sf_pf'), 'pf',
      grepl('undefined', strata), 'undefined',
      default = strata
    )
  ) |>
  group_by(strata, variable, level) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    n_total=sum(n),
    n_miss=sum(miss, na.rm=T),
    count=sum(freq,na.rm=T),
    percent=count/(n_total-n_miss)
  ) 

#Order of Variables
order_vec <- table1_cat$variable
order <- data.frame(
  variable=unique(order_vec)) |>
  mutate(order_number=dplyr::row_number())

aggregate_table1_cat <- aggregate_table1_cat |>
  left_join(order, by='variable') |>
  arrange(strata, order_number)
```

```{r Test For Difference in Distribution of Categorical Variables}
#For Table 1
vars <- c(
  'female',
  'new_race_cat',
  'hospital_type',
  'icu_admit', 
  'imc_admit',
  'ward_admit',
  'icu_type',
  'year',
  'resp_support_category',
  'max_resp_support24',
  'ever_imv',
  'death_hospice28',
  'death_hospice60')

chisq_function <- function(cat_table) {
  chi_df <- data.frame(
    variable = character(),
    chisq = numeric(),
    p.value = numeric()
  )
  
  for (v in vars) {
    x <- cat_table |>
      filter(variable == v)
    
    # Check if there are any rows for the variable
    if (nrow(x) > 0) {
      contingency_table <- xtabs(count ~ level + strata, data = x)
      
      # Print the contingency table to check
      cat('\n')
      print(prop.table(contingency_table, margin=2))
      
      # Perform the chi-squared test
      #First Need to Remove Overall Strata if it Exists
      x <- x |> filter(strata!='Overall')
      contingency_table <- xtabs(count ~ level + strata, data = x)
      chi <- chisq.test(contingency_table)
      # Append the results to chi_df
      chi_df <- rbind(
        chi_df,
        data.frame(
          variable = v,
          chisq = as.numeric(chi$statistic),
          p.value = as.numeric(round(chi$p.value, digits = 4))
        )
      )
    } else {
      # If no data for the variable, append NA values
      cat('\nNo Data for', v)
    }
  }
  return(chi_df)  # Return the results data frame
}

tab1_chi <- chisq_function(aggregate_table1_cat) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Merge Back with Table 1 and COnvert to Wide
table1_cat_paper <- aggregate_table1_cat |>
  select(strata, variable, level, n_total, count, percent, order_number) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c('Overall', 'pf', 'sf', 'undefined')
relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
  relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
}

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table1_cat_paper <- table1_cat_paper |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(tab1_chi, by=c('variable', 'rn')) |>
  arrange(order_number, variable) |>
  select(-order_number, -rn)
```

```{r Now for Continuous Table 1 Generate Weighted Means/SD}
cont_table_function <- function(table_cont) {
  table_cont <- table_cont |>
    group_by(strata, variable) |>
    mutate(
     value_n=n-miss,
     overall_n=sum(value_n, na.rm=T),
     weights = value_n/overall_n,
     weighted_mean=round(sum(mean*weights, na.rm=T), 3),
     weighted_sd=
       round(sqrt(sum((value_n - 1) * sd^2, na.rm = T) / 
                 sum(value_n - 1, na.rm = T)), 2)) |>
      ungroup()
}

table1_working <- table1_cont |>
  #Combine to SF, PF or Undefined
  mutate(
    strata=fcase(
      strata %in% 'sf_only', 'sf',
      strata %in% c('pf_only', 'sf_pf'), 'pf',
      grepl('undefined', strata), 'undefined',
      default = strata),
    )

table1_working <- cont_table_function(table1_working) 

#Function for Weighted ANOVA from Summary Data
weighted_anova_pval <- function(table_cont) {
  df <- table_cont |>
    dplyr::group_by(variable) |>
    filter(strata!='Overall') |>
  # Total number of groups
    mutate(k=length(unique(strata))) |>
    #Between-group sum of squares (SSB)
    mutate( 
           # Total sample size across all strata
           overall_n = sum(value_n, na.rm = TRUE),
           # Grand mean across all strata
           grand_mean = sum(mean * value_n, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(value_n, na.rm = TRUE),
           # Between-strata sum of squares
           ss_between = sum(value_n * (mean - grand_mean)^2, na.rm = TRUE),
           # Within-strata sum of squares
           ss_within = sum((value_n - 1) * sd^2, na.rm = TRUE),
           # Degrees of freedom
           df_between = k-1,
           df_within = overall_n-k, 
           # Mean squares
           ms_between = ss_between/df_between,
           ms_within = ss_within/df_within,
           f_stat = round(ms_between/ms_within, 4),
           p.value = round(pf(f_stat, df_between, df_within, lower.tail = FALSE), 4))
  
  new_columns <- df |>
    select(variable, f_stat, p.value) |>
    dplyr::distinct()
  return(new_columns)
}
group_p_values <- weighted_anova_pval(table1_working)

table1_cont_paper <- table1_working |>
  left_join(group_p_values, by='variable') |>
  select(strata, variable, weighted_mean, weighted_sd, f_stat, p.value, overall_n) |>
  distinct() |>
  rename(
    n_total=overall_n,
    count_mean=weighted_mean,
    percent_sd=weighted_sd
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c('Overall', 'pf', 'sf', 'undefined')
relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
  relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
}

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table1_cont_paper <- table1_cont_paper |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = variable) |>
  mutate(level=NA_character_) |> #For Combining With Cat Table
  relocate(level, .after=variable)

#Now Table 1 Paper
table1_paper <- rowbind(table1_cont_paper, table1_cat_paper, fill=T) 

#Make Table 1 Nice for Easy Pasting Into Paper
readable_table <- function(tab, strata_values, has_continuous, has_categorical) {
  for (z in strata_values) {
    # Create the new column name
    new_col <- paste0(z, "_summary")
    
    # Create the source column names
    count_col <- paste0(z, "_count_mean")
    percent_col <- paste0(z, "_percent_sd")
    
    # Add the new column
    tab <- tab |>
      mutate(
        !!new_col := paste0(
          round(.data[[count_col]], digits = 1), 
          ' (', 
          round(.data[[percent_col]], digits = 1), 
          ')'
        )
      )
  }
  relocate_vector <- c()
  # Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
  for (stratum in strata_values) {
    relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "summary"), sep = "_"))
}
 if (has_categorical == T & has_continuous==T) {
    tab <- tab |>
      select(variable, level, all_of(relocate_vector), p.value, f_stat, chisq) 
  } else if (has_categorical==F & has_continuous==T) {
    tab <- tab |>
      select(variable, level, all_of(relocate_vector), p.value, f_stat) 
  } else if (has_categorical == T & has_continuous==F) {
    tab <- tab |>
      select(variable, level, all_of(relocate_vector), p.value, chisq) 
  }
  
  return(tab)
} 
table1_paper <- readable_table(table1_paper, strata_values, has_continuous=T, has_categorical=T)

#Save Tables
write_csv(table1_paper, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table1_pooled.csv'))
write_csv(aggregate_table1_cat, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table1_aggregate_categorical.csv'))
write_csv(table1_cont, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table1_continuous_by_site.csv'))
```



```{r Test For Difference in Distribution of Categorical Variables - Table1 Without Undefined}
#For now Table 1 Purposes This Ignores Clustering by Site
vars <- c(
  'female',
  'new_race_cat',
  'hospital_type',
  'icu_admit', 
  'imc_admit',
  'ward_admit',
  'icu_type',
  'resp_support_category',
  'max_resp_support24',
  'ever_imv',
  'death_hospice28',
  'death_hospice60')

two_cat <- aggregate_table1_cat |>
  filter(strata!='undefined')
tab1_chi_twocat <- chisq_function(two_cat) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Merge Back with Table 1 and COnvert to Wide
tab1_twocat <- two_cat |>
  select(strata, variable, level, n_total, count, percent, order_number) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c('Overall', 'pf', 'sf')
relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
  relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
}

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
tab1_twocat  <- tab1_twocat  |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(tab1_chi, by=c('variable', 'rn')) |>
  arrange(order_number, variable) |>
  select(-order_number, -rn)
```
```{r Now for Continuous Table 1 Generate Weighted Means/SD - Two Category Only}
table1_cont_two_cat <- table1_cont |>
  #Combine to SF, PF or Undefined
  mutate(
    strata=fcase(
      strata %in% 'sf_only', 'sf',
      strata %in% c('pf_only', 'sf_pf'), 'pf',
      grepl('undefined', strata), 'undefined',
      default = strata),
    ) |>
  filter(strata!='undefined')

table1_working <- cont_table_function(table1_cont_two_cat) 

#Function for Weighted ANOVA from Summary Data

group_p_values <- weighted_anova_pval(table1_working)

table1_cont_paper_twocat <- table1_working |>
  left_join(group_p_values, by='variable') |>
  select(strata, variable, weighted_mean, weighted_sd, f_stat, p.value, overall_n) |>
  filter(strata!='Overall') |>
  distinct() |>
  rename(
    n_total=overall_n,
    count_mean=weighted_mean,
    percent_sd=weighted_sd
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c('pf', 'sf')
relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
  relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
}

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table1_cont_paper_twocat <- table1_cont_paper_twocat |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = variable) |>
  mutate(level=NA_character_) |> #For Combining With Cat Table
  relocate(level, .after=variable)

#Now Table 1 Paper
table1_paper_twocat <- rowbind(table1_cont_paper_twocat, tab1_twocat, fill=T) 
table1_paper_twocat <- readable_table(table1_paper_twocat , strata_values, has_continuous=T,has_categorical=T) 

#Save Tables
write_csv(table1_paper_twocat, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table1_pooled_noundefined.csv'))
```


```{r Describe SpO2/FiO2 and PaO2/FiO2 Availability - Overall and By Support Category}
table2_metrics_exposure <- collate_tables('_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_resp_support.csv') 
  

table2_working <- cont_table_function(table2_metrics_exposure) 

#Function for Weighted ANOVA from Summary Data

group_p_values <- weighted_anova_pval(table2_working)

table2 <- table2_working |>
  left_join(group_p_values, by='variable') |>
  select(strata, variable, weighted_mean, weighted_sd, f_stat, p.value, overall_n) |>
  distinct() |>
  rename(
    n_total=overall_n,
    count_mean=weighted_mean,
    percent_sd=weighted_sd
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <-c("Overall", "imv", "nippv", "high_flow_nc")
relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
  relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
}

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table2 <- table2 |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = variable) |>
  mutate(level='placehold')

#Now the Categorical Variables
table_o2metric_cat <- collate_tables('_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_resp_support.csv') |>
  group_by(strata, variable, level) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    n_total=sum(n),
    n_miss=sum(miss, na.rm=T),
    count=sum(freq,na.rm=T),
    percent=count/(n_total-n_miss)
  ) 
vars <- c(
  'abg_measured',
  'any_sf',
  'abg_and_sf')

#Order of Variables
order_vec <- table_o2metric_cat$variable
order <- data.frame(
  variable=unique(order_vec)) |>
  mutate(order_number=dplyr::row_number())

table_o2metric_cat <- table_o2metric_cat |>
  left_join(order, by='variable') |>
  arrange(strata, order_number)

table_o2metric_cat_chi <- chisq_function(table_o2metric_cat) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Merge Back with Table 1 and COnvert to Wide
table_o2metric_cat <- table_o2metric_cat |>
  select(strata, variable, level, n_total, count, percent, order_number) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table_o2metric_cat  <- table_o2metric_cat  |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(table_o2metric_cat_chi, by=c('variable', 'rn')) |>
  arrange(order_number, variable) |>
  select(-order_number, -rn)

#Now For a Readable Table
table2_paper <- rowbind(table2, table_o2metric_cat, fill=T) 
table2_paper <- readable_table(table2_paper, strata_values, has_continuous=T,has_categorical=T) 

#Save Tables
write_csv(table2_paper, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table2_metric_count_resp_support.csv'))
```

```{r Describe SpO2/FiO2 and PaO2/FiO2 Availability - Overall and By Support Category - no Undefined}
table2_metrics_exposure <- collate_tables('_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_resp_support_noundefined.csv') 
table2_working <- cont_table_function(table2_metrics_exposure) 

#Function for Weighted ANOVA from Summary Data

group_p_values <- weighted_anova_pval(table2_working)

table2 <- table2_working |>
  left_join(group_p_values, by='variable') |>
  select(strata, variable, weighted_mean, weighted_sd, f_stat, p.value, overall_n) |>
  distinct() |>
  rename(
    n_total=overall_n,
    count_mean=weighted_mean,
    percent_sd=weighted_sd
  ) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <-c("Overall", "imv", "nippv", "high_flow_nc")
relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
  relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
}

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table2 <- table2 |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = variable) |>
  mutate(level='placehold')

#Now the Categorical Variables
table_o2metric_cat <- collate_tables('_table2_o2metrics_cat_by_resp_support_noundefined.csv') |>
  group_by(strata, variable, level) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    n_total=sum(n),
    n_miss=sum(miss, na.rm=T),
    count=sum(freq,na.rm=T),
    percent=count/(n_total-n_miss)
  ) 
vars <- c(
  'abg_measured',
  'any_sf',
  'abg_and_sf')

#Order of Variables
order_vec <- table_o2metric_cat$variable
order <- data.frame(
  variable=unique(order_vec)) |>
  mutate(order_number=dplyr::row_number())

table_o2metric_cat <- table_o2metric_cat |>
  left_join(order, by='variable') |>
  arrange(strata, order_number)

table_o2metric_cat_chi <- chisq_function(table_o2metric_cat) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Merge Back with Table 1 and COnvert to Wide
table_o2metric_cat <- table_o2metric_cat |>
  select(strata, variable, level, n_total, count, percent, order_number) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table_o2metric_cat  <- table_o2metric_cat  |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(table_o2metric_cat_chi, by=c('variable', 'rn')) |>
  arrange(order_number, variable) |>
  select(-order_number, -rn)

#Now For a Readable Table
table2_paper <- rowbind(table2, table_o2metric_cat, fill=T) 
table2_paper <- readable_table(table2_paper, strata_values, has_continuous=T,has_categorical=T) 

#Save Tables
write_csv(table2_paper, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table2_metric_count_resp_support_no_undefined.csv'))
```
```{r Spo2 and PaO2 Counts}
#Evaluate Measure Counts Overall and By Respiratory Category
sf_pf_counts_overall <- collate_tables('_pf_sf_count_table.csv') |>
  group_by(variable, strata, strata_cat) |>
  summarise(
    n = sum(n, na.rm=T),
    count = sum(count, na.rm=T),
    missing = sum(missing, na.rm=T),
  ) |>
  filter(strata_cat %in% c('Overall', 'resp_support_category')) |>
  #To Wide Format
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = variable,
    values_from = count
  ) |>
  #NOTE: Here Eligible SF and Eligible Spo2 Differ From Pao2 and Spo2 By Whether or NOt it Was Within 2 Hours of Last FiO2
  mutate(
    spo2_with_sf=n_eligible_sf_spo2_lt98/n_eligible_spo2, 
    site='Overall') |>
  relocate(site, .after = strata)
  
sf_pf_counts <- collate_tables('_pf_sf_count_table.csv') |>
  filter(strata_cat %in% c('Overall', 'resp_support_category')) |>
  #To Wide Format
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = c('strata', 'site'),
    names_from = variable,
    values_from = count
  ) |>
  #NOTE: Here Eligible SF and Eligible Spo2 Differ From Pao2 and Spo2 By Whether or NOt it Was Within 2 Hours of Last FiO2
  mutate(
    spo2_with_sf=n_eligible_sf_spo2_lt98/n_eligible_spo2)

sf_pf_counts <- rowbind(sf_pf_counts_overall, sf_pf_counts, fill=T)

#Now Do This at the Patient Level
table2_metrics_exposure <- collate_tables('_table2_o2metrics_cont_by_resp_support.csv') 
table2_working <- cont_table_function(table2_metrics_exposure) 

sf_pf_patient_level <- table2_working |>
  #Select the Overall N and Weighted Means
  distinct(strata, variable, overall_n, weighted_mean, weighted_sd) 

#Save Tables
write_csv(sf_pf_counts, paste0(project_location, '/tables/sf_pf_counts.csv'))
write_csv(sf_pf_patient_level, paste0(project_location, '/tables/sf_pf_patient_level.csv'))
rm(table2_metrics_exposure, table2_working, sf_pf_counts_overall)

#Plot Counts and Means at Patient Level
sf_pf_graph <- collate_tables('_pf_sf_count_table.csv') |>
  group_by(variable, strata, strata_cat) |>
  summarise(
    n = sum(n, na.rm=T),
    count = sum(count, na.rm=T),
    missing = sum(missing, na.rm=T)
  ) |>
  filter(strata_cat %in% c('Overall', 'resp_support_category'),
         variable %in% c('n_eligible_sf_spo2_gt97', 'n_eligible_sf_spo2_lt98')) |>
  left_join(sf_pf_counts %>% select(strata, spo2_with_sf, n_eligible_spo2), by = 'strata') |>
  mutate(
    variable = ifelse(
      variable == 'n_eligible_sf_spo2_lt98', 'n_calculable_sf', variable),
    variable = ifelse(
      variable == 'n_eligible_sf_spo2_gt97', 'total_eligible_spo2', variable
    ),
    variable = factor(variable, 
                     levels = c( "total_eligible_spo2", "n_calculable_sf"),
                     labels = c("# SpO2 with FiO2", '# Calculable SF (SPO2<=97%)'),
                     ordered = TRUE),  # Adjust the order here
    strata = factor(strata, 
                    levels = c("Overall", "imv", "high_flow_nc", "nippv"),
                    labels = c("Overall", "IMV", "HFNO", "NIPPV")),
    total=fifelse(variable=="# SpO2 with FiO2", count, NA_real_))

#Now Plot
ggplot(sf_pf_graph, aes(x = strata, y = count, fill = variable)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_label(
    aes(x = strata, y = n_eligible_spo2, 
        label = paste0(round(spo2_with_sf * 100, 1), "%")),
    vjust = -0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = "bold",
    fill = "white",
    label.size = 0.5,  # Border thickness
    label.padding = unit(0.25, "lines")  # Padding around text
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Respiratory Support Category",
    y = "Count",
    fill = "% of SpO2 ≤ 97%"
  ) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer() +
  theme(
    legend.position = c(0.92, 0.75),  # Adjust x to ~88% for position near bar 3.5
    legend.justification = c("right", "top"),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "white", color = "gray50"),
    legend.margin = margin(6, 6, 6, 6)
  )
ggsave(
  filename='spo2_count_barchart.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  units ='in',
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Now Per Patient Average
#Prepare Data
sf_pf_graph <- sf_pf_patient_level |>
  mutate(
    total=fifelse(variable=="n_eligible_spo2", weighted_mean, NA_real_)) |>
  group_by(strata) |>
  fill(total, .direction = 'updown', .by = strata) |>
  filter(strata %in% c('Overall', 'imv', 'nippv', 'high_flow_nc'),
         variable %in% c('n_eligible_sf_spo2_gt97', 'n_eligible_sf_spo2_lt98')) |>
  mutate(
    variable = ifelse(
      variable == 'n_eligible_sf_spo2_lt98', 'n_calculable_sf', variable),
    variable = ifelse(
      variable == 'n_eligible_sf_spo2_gt97', 'total_eligible_spo2', variable
    ),
    variable = factor(variable, 
                     levels = c( "total_eligible_spo2", "n_calculable_sf"),
                     labels = c("# SpO2 with FiO2", '# Calculable SF (SPO2<=97%)'),
                     ordered = TRUE),  # Adjust the order here
    strata = factor(strata, 
                    levels = c("Overall", "imv", "high_flow_nc", "nippv"),
                    labels = c("Overall", "IMV", "HFNO", "NIPPV"))) |>
    ungroup()

#Now Plot
ggplot(sf_pf_graph, aes(x = strata, y = round(weighted_mean, digits=0), fill = variable)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
  geom_label(
    aes(x = strata, y = total, 
        label = paste0(round(total, 1))),
    vjust = -0.5,
    inherit.aes = FALSE,
    size = 3.5,
    fontface = "bold",
    fill = "white",
    label.size = 0.5,  # Border thickness
    label.padding = unit(0.25, "lines")  # Padding around text
  ) +
  labs(x = "Respiratory Support Category",
       y = "Mean Per Patient Count",
       fill = "Per Patient Mean Count, Stratified by:") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = comma) +
  theme_minimal() +
  scale_fill_brewer()
ggsave(
  filename='spo2_per_patient_count_barchart.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  units ='in',
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```

```{r Plot Admissions Over Time}
admits_by_quarter_hospital <- collate_tables('_arf_per_quarter_hospital.csv') 
admits_by_quarter <- collate_tables('_arf_per_quarter.csv') 


#Visualize Resp Failure Over Time
quarter_labels <- c(
'Jan-Mar\n2021', 'Apr-Jun\n2021', 'Jul-Sep\n2021', 'Oct-Dec\n2021',
'Jan-Mar\n2022', 'Apr-Jun\n2022', 'Jul-Sep\n2022', 'Oct-Dec\n2022',
'Jan-Mar\n2023', 'Apr-Jun\n2023', 'Jul-Sep\n2023', 'Oct-Dec\n2023',
'Jan-Mar\n2024', 'Apr-Jun\n2024', 'Jul-Sep\n2024', 'Oct-Dec\n2024',
'Jan-Mar\n2025')

quarter_admit_graph <- admits_by_quarter |>
  dplyr::group_by(site, study_quarter) |>
  dplyr::arrange(site, study_quarter) |>
  filter(dplyr::row_number()==1) |>
  mutate(site=as.character(1:length(unique(admits_by_quarter$site))))

#Select the Relevant Months from This Vector Using the min_month, max_month
min_quarter <- min(quarter_admit_graph$study_quarter)
max_quarter <- max(quarter_admit_graph$study_quarter)
site_quarter_labels <- quarter_labels[min_quarter:max_quarter]

max_quarter_n <- quarter_admit_graph |>
  group_by(study_quarter) |>
  mutate(sum_n=sum(n_patients_quarter, na.rm=T)) |>
  ungroup() 
max_quarter_n <- max(max_quarter_n$sum_n)

#Visualize Resp Failure Cases Admits Over Time by Hospital
plot <- ggplot(quarter_admit_graph, aes(x=study_quarter, y=n_patients_quarter, fill = site)) +
  geom_col(position = 'stack') +
  theme_classic() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(min_quarter, max_quarter, by=1),
                     labels = site_quarter_labels,
                     name = 'Months-Year') +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 4.75)) +
  scale_y_continuous(
    breaks=seq(0, max_quarter_n, by=50),
    name = 'Number of Admissions') +
  scale_fill_viridis_d('CLIF Site')

ggsave(
  filename='admits_per_site_quarter.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  units ='in',
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

rm(quarter_admit_graph)
```


```{r Describe ABG Practices Over Time}
#Dataset with 1 Row per Quarter and Hospital with n_patients and n_abgs
abgs_by_hospital <- admits_by_quarter_hospital |>
   dplyr::group_by(hospital_id, study_quarter) |>
   dplyr::filter(dplyr::row_number()==1)     

#Dotplot by Hospital
plot <- ggplot(abgs_by_hospital, 
        aes(x=factor(study_quarter), y=percent_with_abg)) +
   stat_summary(fun = median, color = "orangered4",
                geom = "crossbar", width = 0.60, alpha = 0.75, linewidth = 0.50) +
   geom_dotplot(aes(fill=hospital_id),
                binaxis = "y", stackdir="center", dotsize = 0.35,
                binwidth = 0.05, alpha = 0.80, 
                position=position_jitter(0.05)) +
   scale_x_discrete(breaks=seq(min_quarter, max_quarter, by=1),
                      labels = site_quarter_labels,
                      name = 'Months-Year') +
   scale_y_continuous(
     breaks=seq(0, 1, by=0.1), limits = c(0,1), labels = scales::percent,
     name = 'Percent of Patients with \n Arterial Blood Gas') +
   scale_fill_viridis_d('Hospital') +
   theme_minimal() +
   theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, vjust = 1, hjust = 1, size = 5.75))
 
ggsave(
   filename='abgs_per_quarter.pdf',
   plot=last_plot(),
   device=cairo_pdf(),
   width = 8,
   height = 5,
   units ='in',
   path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```

```{r Distribution of SF or PF Measures by Hour}
aggregate_hours <- collate_tables('_aggregate_hours_to_measure.csv') |>
  group_by(exposure_group, hour_measure, variable, strata) |>
  summarise(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T),
  ) |>
  mutate(site='Overall') |>
  filter(!is.na(hour_measure))
max_n <- max(aggregate_hours$n_in_group)

plot <- ggplot(subset(aggregate_hours, variable %in% c('clock_hr_min_pf_dttm', 'clock_hr_min_sf_dttm')),
       aes(x = hour_measure, y = n_in_group, fill = variable)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha =0.50) +  # This uses `n_in_group` directly as heights for bars
  labs(
       x = "Clock Hour",
       y = "Count",
       fill = "") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,23, by =1)) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename='clock_hour_measures.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  units ='in',
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

plot <- ggplot(subset(aggregate_hours, variable %in% c('hours_to_min_sf_dttm', 'hours_to_min_pf_dttm')),
       aes(x = hour_measure, y = n_in_group, fill = variable)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", alpha =0.50) +  # This uses `n_in_group` directly as heights for bars
  labs(
       x = "Hours from Respiratory Failure to Minimum SF or PF",
       y = "Count",
       fill = "") +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks=seq(0,23, by =1)) +
  theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename='hour_from_sf_measures.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  device=cairo_pdf(),
  width = 8,
  height = 5,
  units ='in',
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```


```{r Contingency Table Oxygenation Category by SF v PF}
LEFT OFF HERE

oxygenation_agreement <- collate_tables('_table_agreement.csv')

oxygenation_aggregate <- oxygenation_agreement |>
  group_by(strata, variable, level) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    n_total=sum(n),
    n_miss=sum(miss, na.rm=T),
    count=sum(freq,na.rm=T),
    percent=count/(n_total-n_miss)
  ) |>
  filter(level!='undefined')

#Order of Variables
order_vec <- oxygenation_aggregate$variable
order <- data.frame(
  variable=unique(order_vec)) |>
  mutate(order_number=dplyr::row_number())

oxygenation_aggregate <- oxygenation_aggregate |>
  left_join(order, by='variable') |>
  arrange(strata, order_number)

#For now Table 1 Purposes This Ignores Clustering by Site
vars <- c(
  'oxygenation_category',
  'sofa2_cat')

oxygenation_agreement_chi <- chisq_function(oxygenation_aggregate) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Covert to Wide
tab_oxygenation_agreement <- oxygenation_aggregate |>
  select(strata, variable, level, n_total, count, percent, order_number) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c('Overall', 'pf', 'sf')
relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
  relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
}

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
tab_oxygenation_agreement  <- tab_oxygenation_agreement  |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(oxygenation_agreement_chi, by=c('variable', 'rn')) |>
  arrange(order_number, variable) |>
  select(-order_number, -rn)

strata_values <- c('Overall', 'pf', 'sf')
tab_o2_agreement_paper <- readable_table(tab_oxygenation_agreement, strata_values, has_continuous=F,has_categorical=T) 

write_csv(tab_o2_agreement_paper, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table_o2cat_agreement.csv'))
```


```{r Distribution of n of Patients within Each Category - Heatmap}
heat_map_o2 <- oxygenation_aggregate %>%
filter(variable %in% c("oxygenation_category", "sofa2_cat"),
       strata %in% c("pf", "sf")) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(count, " (", percent(percent, accuracy = 0.1), ")"))

#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("not_hypoxemic", "mild_hypoxemia", "moderate_hypoxemia", "severe_hypoxemia")
heat_map_o2_cat <- heat_map_o2 |>
  filter(variable=='oxygenation_category') |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

ggplot(heat_map_o2_cat, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="Prevalence",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\nHypoxemia', 'Moderate\nHypoxemia', 'Severe\nHypoxemia')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = "Distribution of oxygenation categories",
       fontface='bold',
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_distribution_pf_vs.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
heat_map_o2_sofa <- heat_map_o2 |>
  filter(variable=='sofa2_cat') |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

ggplot(heat_map_o2_sofa, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="Prevalence",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = "Distribution of SOFA-2 Resp Scores",
       fontface='bold') +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='sofa2_category_distribution_pf_vs.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))


#Now Illustrate How O2 Category and O2 Category Both Correlate
heat_map_o2 <- oxygenation_aggregate %>%
filter(variable %in% c('oxygenation_category', 
              'oxygenation_category_sf_both', 
              'o2_cat_sf_pf_contemporary',
              'sofa2_cat', 'sofa2_cat_sf_both', 'sofa2_cat_sf_contemp_pf'),
       strata %in% c("pf", "sf_pf")) |>
  mutate(label = paste0(count, " (", percent(percent, accuracy = 0.1), ")"))

#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("not_hypoxemic", "mild_hypoxemia", "moderate_hypoxemia", "severe_hypoxemia")
heat_map_o2_cat <- heat_map_o2 |>
  filter(variable %in% c('oxygenation_category', 'oxygenation_category_sf_both')) |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

ggplot(heat_map_o2_cat, aes(x = level, y = variable, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="Prevalence",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\nHypoxemia', 'Moderate\nHypoxemia', 'Severe\nHypoxemia')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = "Oxygenation Severity in Those with both PF and SF",
       fontface='bold',
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_distribution_pf_vs_sf_both.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  cairo_pdf(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

cat_levels <- c("not_hypoxemic", "mild_hypoxemia", "moderate_hypoxemia", "severe_hypoxemia")
heat_map_o2_cat <- heat_map_o2 |>
  filter(variable %in% c('oxygenation_category', 
                         'o2_cat_sf_pf_contemporary')) |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

ggplot(heat_map_o2_cat, aes(x = level, y = variable, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="Prevalence",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'Contemporary \n SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\nHypoxemia', 'Moderate\nHypoxemia', 'Severe\nHypoxemia')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = "Oxygenation Severity by PF and Contemporaenously Measured SF",
       fontface='bold',
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_distribution_pf_vs_sf_contemporary.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  cairo_pdf(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
heat_map_o2_sofa <- heat_map_o2 |>
  filter(variable %in% c('sofa2_cat', 'sofa2_cat_sf_both')) |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

ggplot(heat_map_o2_sofa, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="Prevalence",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = "Distribution of SOFA-2 Resp Scores in Those with both PF and SF",
       fontface='bold') +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='sofa2_category_distribution_pf_vs_sf_both.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))


#Contemporaneous SOFA2 with SF
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
heat_map_o2_sofa <- heat_map_o2 |>
  filter(variable %in% c('sofa2_cat', 'sofa2_cat_sf_contemp_pf')) |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

ggplot(heat_map_o2_sofa, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="Prevalence",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = "Distribution of SOFA-2-Resp by PF and Contemporaenously Measured SF",
       fontface='bold') +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='sofa2_category_distribution_pf_vs_sf_contemporaneous.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```


```{r Mortality by SF vs PF Oxygenation Category}
#Do this Once Other Sites Have Run
mortality_by_o2 <- collate_tables('_aggregate_by_o2cat.csv')

#Prepare Data for 
aggregate_table_mortality <- mortality_by_o2 |>
  group_by(strata, variable, level) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    n_total=sum(n),
    n_miss=sum(miss, na.rm=T),
    count=sum(freq,na.rm=T),
    percent=count/(n_total-n_miss)
  ) 

#Order of Variables
order_vec <-  mortality_by_o2$variable
order <- data.frame(
  variable=unique(order_vec)) |>
  mutate(order_number=dplyr::row_number())

aggregate_table_mortality  <- aggregate_table_mortality  |>
  left_join(order, by='variable') |>
  arrange(strata, order_number)

vars <- c(
  'death_hospice28',
  'death_hospice60'
)
mortality_tab_chi <- chisq_function(aggregate_table_mortality) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Merge Back with Table 1 and COnvert to Wide
table_mortality_paper <- aggregate_table_mortality |>
  select(strata, variable, level, n_total, count, percent, order_number) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  distinct() 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c(
  'Overall', 
  'pf-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'pf-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'pf-severe_hypoxemia',
  'pf-not_hypoxemic',
  'sf-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'sf-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'sf-severe_hypoxemia',
  'sf-not_hypoxemic',
  'sf_pf_-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'sf_pf_-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'sf_pf_-severe_hypoxemia',
  'sf_pf_-not_hypoxemic',
  'sf_pf_contemp-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'sf_pf_contemp-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'sf_pf_contemp-severe_hypoxemia',
  'sf_pf_contemp-not_hypoxemic',
  'pf-0',
  'pf-1',
  'pf-2',
  'pf-3',
  'pf-4',
  'sf-0',
  'sf-1',
  'sf-2',
  'sf-3',
  'sf-4',
  'sf_pf_-0',
  'sf_pf_-1',
  'sf_pf_-2',
  'sf_pf_-3',
  'sf_pf_-4',
  'sf_pf_contemp-0',
  'sf_pf_contemp-1',
  'sf_pf_contemp-2',
  'sf_pf_contemp-3',
  'sf_pf_contemp-4'
  )

#Keep Long Form Table
table_mortality_long <- table_mortality_paper |>
  filter(level==1,
         strata %in% strata_values) |>
  select(-level, -order_number)
  
table_mortality_paper <- table_mortality_paper |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 


relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
  relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                       paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
}


#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table_mortality_paper <- table_mortality_paper |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(tab1_chi, by=c('variable', 'rn')) |>
  arrange(order_number, variable) |>
  select(-order_number, -rn) |>
  filter(level==1)

table_mortality_paper <- readable_table(table_mortality_paper, strata_values, has_continuous=F,has_categorical=T)

write_csv(table_mortality_paper, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table_o2cat_mortality.csv'))
write_csv(table_mortality_long, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table_o2cat_mortality_long.csv'))
```

```{r Mortality by O2 Category HeatMap}
heat_map_o2_mortality <- aggregate_table_mortality %>%
  filter(strata %in% strata_values,
         strata!='Overall', 
         level==1) |> #Only Need 1 Level) 
  mutate(label = paste0(percent(percent, accuracy = 0.1))) |>
  separate(strata, into = c("strata","level"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE)

#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("not_hypoxemic", "mild_hypoxemia", "moderate_hypoxemia", "severe_hypoxemia")
heat_map_o2_cat <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==T) |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

#Just SF and PF for Main Graph
heat_graph <- heat_map_o2_cat |>
  filter(strata %in% c('sf', 'pf'))
ggplot(heat_graph,
              aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\nHypoxemia', 'Moderate\nHypoxemia', 'Severe\nHypoxemia')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_graph$n_total, na.rm=T), ')'),
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_mortality.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Order Sofa Categories
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
heat_map_sofa <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==F) |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

heat_graph <- heat_map_sofa |>
  filter(strata %in% c('sf', 'pf'))
ggplot(heat_graph, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_graph$n_total, na.rm=T), ')'),
       fontface='bold',
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_sofa_mortality.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Now Repeat For those with Both SF and PF
heat_graph <- heat_map_o2_cat |>
  filter(strata %in% c('sf_pf_', 'pf'))
ggplot(heat_graph,
              aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\nHypoxemia', 'Moderate\nHypoxemia', 'Severe\nHypoxemia')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_graph$n_total, na.rm=T), ')'),
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_mortality.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Order Sofa Categories
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
heat_map_sofa <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==F) |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels))

heat_graph <- heat_map_sofa |>
  filter(strata %in% c('sf', 'pf'))
ggplot(heat_graph, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_graph$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_graph$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_graph$n_total, na.rm=T), ')'),
       fontface='bold',
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_sofa_mortality.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))



#Now repeat for those with Contemporary SF and PF
```

```{r Stratified Mortality by Categorization According to Black, Not Black}
#Do this Once Other Sites Have Run
mortality_by_o2_race <- collate_tables('_aggregate_by_o2cat_race.csv')

#Prepare Data for 
aggregate_mortality_race <- mortality_by_o2_race |>
  mutate(
    black=fifelse(new_race_cat=='black', 'black', 'not_black')
  ) |>
  group_by(strata, strata_type, black, variable, level) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    n_total=sum(n, na.rm=T),
    n_miss=sum(miss, na.rm=T),
    count=sum(freq,na.rm=T),
    percent=count/(n_total-n_miss)
  ) 

aggregate_mortality_race  <- aggregate_mortality_race  |>
  left_join(order, by='variable') |>
  arrange(strata, order_number)

vars <- c(
  'death_hospice28',
  'death_hospice60'
)
mortality_tab_chi <- chisq_function(aggregate_mortality_race) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Merge Back with Table 1 and COnvert to Wide
table_mortality_race_paper <- aggregate_mortality_race |>
  select(strata, black, variable, level, n_total, count, percent, order_number) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  distinct() |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c(
  'Overall', 
  'pf-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'pf-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'pf-severe_hypoxemia',
  'pf-not_hypoxemic',
  'sf-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'sf-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'sf-severe_hypoxemia',
  'sf-not_hypoxemic',
  'pf-0',
  'pf-1',
  'pf-2',
  'pf-3',
  'pf-4',
  'sf-0',
  'sf-1',
  'sf-2',
  'sf-3',
  'sf-4'
)

relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
    relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                         paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
  }

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table_mortality_race_paper <- table_mortality_race_paper |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(tab1_chi, by=c('variable')) |>
  arrange(order_number, variable) |>
  select(-order_number) |>
  filter(level==1)
stratified_keep <- table_mortality_race_paper |>
  select(black, variable, Overall_n_total) |>
  distinct()

table_mortality_race_paper <- readable_table(table_mortality_race_paper, strata_values, has_continuous=F, has_categorical=T) |>
  left_join(stratified_keep) |>
  relocate(black, .after=variable)

write_csv(table_mortality_race_paper, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table_o2cat_mortality_race.csv'))
```

```{r Mortality Heat Map Stratified by Race}
heat_map_o2_mortality <- aggregate_mortality_race %>%
  filter(strata %in% strata_values,
         strata!='Overall', 
         level==1) |> #Only Need 1 Level) 
  mutate(label = paste0(percent(percent, accuracy = 0.1))) |>
  separate(strata, into = c("strata","level"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE)

#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("not_hypoxemic", "mild_hypoxemia", "moderate_hypoxemia", "severe_hypoxemia")
heat_map_o2_cat <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==T) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels),
    black  = factor(black, levels = c("black", "not_black"))
) |>
group_by(black) |>
complete(
level  = levels(level),
strata = c("pf", "sf"),
fill   = list(percent = NA_real_, label = "")
) |>
ungroup()

ggplot(heat_map_o2_cat, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\nHypoxemia', 'Moderate\nHypoxemia', 'Severe\nHypoxemia')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_grid(. ~ black, labeller = ggplot2::as_labeller(c(black = "Black", not_black = "Not Black"))) +
  facet_wrap(vars(black), ncol = 1) +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_map_o2_cat$n_total, na.rm=T), ')'),
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_mortality_race.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Order Sofa Categories
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
heat_map_sofa <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==F) |>
  mutate(level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels),
         black  = factor(black, levels = c("black", "not_black"))
) |>
group_by(black) |>
complete(
level  = levels(level),
strata = c("pf", "sf"),
fill   = list(percent = NA_real_, label = "")) |>
ungroup()

ggplot(heat_map_sofa, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_sofa$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_sofa$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_sofa$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_grid(. ~ black, labeller = ggplot2::as_labeller(c(black = "Black", not_black = "Not Black"))) +
  facet_wrap(vars(black), ncol = 1) +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_map_sofa$n_total, na.rm=T), ')'),
       fontface='bold',
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_sofa_mortality_race.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```
```{r Stratified Mortality by Respiratory Support}
#Do this Once Other Sites Have Run
mortality_by_o2_resp <- collate_tables('_aggregate_by_o2cat_resp_support.csv')

#Prepare Data for 
aggregate_mortality_resp <- mortality_by_o2_resp |>
  mutate(
    resp_support_category=fifelse(resp_support_category=='cpap', 'nippv', resp_support_category)
  ) |>
  group_by(strata, strata_type, resp_support_category, variable, level) |>
  dplyr::reframe(
    n_total=sum(n, na.rm=T),
    n_miss=sum(miss, na.rm=T),
    count=sum(freq,na.rm=T),
    percent=count/(n_total-n_miss)
  ) 

vars <- c(
  'death_hospice28',
  'death_hospice60'
)
mortality_tab_chi <- chisq_function(aggregate_mortality_resp) |>
  mutate(rn=1)

#Merge Back with Table 1 and COnvert to Wide
table_mortality_resp <- aggregate_mortality_resp |>
  select(strata, resp_support_category, variable, level, n_total, count, percent) |>
  mutate(
    percent=round((percent*100), digits = 2)
  ) |>
  rename(count_mean=count,
         percent_sd=percent) |>
  distinct() |>
  pivot_wider(
    names_from=c(strata),
    names_glue="{strata}_{.value}",
    values_from=c(n_total, count_mean, percent_sd)) 

#Vector For Reordering Columns
strata_values <- c(
  'Overall', 
  'pf-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'pf-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'pf-severe_hypoxemia',
  'pf-not_hypoxemic',
  'sf-mild_hypoxemia', 
  'sf-moderate_hypoxemia', 
  'sf-severe_hypoxemia',
  'sf-not_hypoxemic',
  'pf-0',
  'pf-1',
  'pf-2',
  'pf-3',
  'pf-4',
  'sf-0',
  'sf-1',
  'sf-2',
  'sf-3',
  'sf-4'
)

relocate_vector <- c()
# Loop through the strata values to generate names for those strata
for (stratum in strata_values) {
    relocate_vector <- c(relocate_vector,
                         paste(stratum, c("n_total", "count_mean", "percent_sd"), sep = "_"))
  }

#Reorder and Add Statistical Testing
table_mortality_resp <- table_mortality_resp |>
  relocate(all_of(relocate_vector), .after = level) |>
  group_by(variable) |>
  mutate(rn=dplyr::row_number()) |>
  left_join(tab1_chi, by=c('variable')) |>
  filter(level==1)
stratified_keep <- table_mortality_resp |>
  select(resp_support_category, variable, Overall_n_total) |>
  distinct()

table_mortality_resp <- readable_table(table_mortality_resp, strata_values, has_continuous=F, has_categorical=T) |>
  left_join(stratified_keep) |>
  relocate(resp_support_category, .after=variable)

write_csv(table_mortality_resp, paste0(project_location, '/tables/table_o2cat_mortality_resp_support.csv'))
```


```{r Heat Map with Mortality by Respiratory Support}
heat_map_o2_mortality <- aggregate_mortality_resp %>%
  filter(strata %in% strata_values,
         strata!='Overall',
         level==1) |> #Only Need 1 Level) 
  mutate(label = paste0(percent(percent, accuracy = 0.1))) |>
  separate(strata, into = c("strata","level"), sep = "-", remove = FALSE)

#Order Hypoxemia Categories
cat_levels <- c("not_hypoxemic", "mild_hypoxemia", "moderate_hypoxemia", "severe_hypoxemia")
heat_map_o2_cat <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==T) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels),
    resp_support_category  = factor(resp_support_category, 
                                    levels = c("high_flow_nc", "imv", "nippv"))
) |>
group_by(resp_support_category) |>
complete(
level  = levels(level),
strata = c("pf", "sf"),
fill   = list(percent = NA_real_, label = "")
) |>
ungroup() |>
  filter(percent!='NA')

ggplot(heat_map_o2_cat, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_o2_cat$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='',
                   labels = c('Not\nHypoxemic', 'Mild\nHypoxemia', 'Moderate\nHypoxemia', 'Severe\nHypoxemia')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() + 
  facet_grid(. ~ resp_support_category, labeller = ggplot2::as_labeller(c(imv = "IMV", high_flow_nc = "HIFNC", nippv="NIPPV"))) +
  facet_wrap(vars(resp_support_category), ncol=2) +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_map_o2_cat$n_total, na.rm=T), ')'),
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_category_mortality_resp_support.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#Order Sofa Categories
cat_levels <- c("0", "1", "2", "3", "4")
heat_map_sofa <- heat_map_o2_mortality |>
  filter(
    variable=='death_hospice28',
    grepl('hypox', level)==F) |>
  mutate(
    level = factor(level, levels = cat_levels),
    resp_support_category  = factor(resp_support_category, 
                                    levels = c("high_flow_nc", "imv", "nippv"))
) |>
group_by(resp_support_category) |>
complete(
level  = levels(level),
strata = c("pf", "sf"),
fill   = list(percent = NA_real_, label = "")
) |>
ungroup() |>
  filter(percent!='NA')

ggplot(heat_map_sofa, aes(x = level, y = strata, fill = percent)) +
  geom_tile(color = "white", width = 0.95, height = 0.95) +
  scale_fill_gradient2(name="",
    low = 'dodgerblue4',
    mid = 'white',
    high = 'firebrick2',
    limits = c(0, max(heat_map_sofa$percent)),
    midpoint = (max(heat_map_sofa$percent)/2),
    breaks = c(0, max(heat_map_sofa$percent)),
    labels = c('Lower', 'Higher')      # no labels on colorbar
  ) +
  scale_y_discrete(name='', labels = c('PaO2/FiO2 Defined', 'SpO2/FiO2 Defined')) +
  scale_x_discrete(name='SOFA-2 Respiratory Score',
                   labels = c('0', '1', '2', '3', '4')) +
  geom_text(aes(label = label), size = 3, fontface='bold') +
  coord_equal() +
  facet_grid(. ~ resp_support_category, labeller = ggplot2::as_labeller(c(imv = "IMV", high_flow_nc = "HIFNC", nippv="NIPPV"))) +
  facet_wrap(vars(resp_support_category), ncol=2) +
  labs(x = "Hypoxemia Severity Category", 
       title = paste0("Death or Hospice by Day 28, (n=",sum(heat_map_sofa$n_total, na.rm=T), ')'),
       fontface='bold',
       size=4) +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='o2_sofa_mortality_resp.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

```

```{r Now Evaluate Discrimination by Fitting Logistic Regression}
#Include Cubic Spline Terms with 3 Knotw
#aggregate_continuous <- collate_tables("_aggregate_outcomes.csv")
aggregate_continuous_hospital <- site_table_data$hopkins_aggregate_outcomes.csv |>
  mutate(site='hopkins') |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$rush_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'rush', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$nu_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'nu', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$umn_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'umn', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$michigan_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'michigan', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$penn_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'penn', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$ucmc_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'ucmc', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$emory_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'emory', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$ohsu_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'ohsu', site)) |>
  filter(strata_cat=='hospital_id') |>
  mutate(
    prob_death28=n_deathhosp28/n_in_group,
    prob_death60=n_deathhosp60/n_in_group)

#Evaluate Shape of Relationship Using Smoothing Term
ggplot(data=
         subset(aggregate_continuous_hospital, primary_metric=='pf'), 
       aes(x=measure_value_5, y=prob_death28)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()

#Run Random Effects Aggregate Logistic Regression for Death/Hospice by Day 28
pf_glm <- glmmTMB(
prob_death28 ~ rcs(measure_value_5, 4) + (1 | hospital_id),
data   = dplyr::filter(aggregate_continuous_hospital, primary_metric == "pf"),
family = binomial(link = "logit"),
weights = n_in_group
)

tidy_fix_pf <- broom.mixed::tidy(
  pf_glm,
  effects = "fixed",
  component = "cond",
  conf.int = TRUE,
  exponentiate = TRUE
) 
tidy_fix_pf

#Visualize
grid <- aggregate_continuous_hospital |>
  filter(primary_metric=='pf') |>
  group_by(measure_value_5) |>
  summarise(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  )
predicted_pf <- as_tibble(predictions(pf_glm, new_data=grid, re.form=NA)) |>
  select(measure_value_5, n_in_group, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) |>
  group_by(measure_value_5) |>
  mutate(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  ) |>
  distinct()

ggplot(predicted_pf, aes(x = measure_value_5, y = estimate)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
              fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(color = "firebrick2", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_in_group), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 2), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1)
) +
  labs(x = "PaO2/FiO2",
       y = "Predicted probability",
       title = "Predicted probability with 95% CI band") +
theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='predicted_deathhospice28_pf.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))


#Evaluate Shape of Relationship Using Smoothing Term
ggplot(data=
         subset(aggregate_continuous_hospital, primary_metric=='sf'), 
       aes(x=measure_value_5, y=prob_death28)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_smooth()

#Run Random Effects Aggregate Logistic Regression for Death/Hospice by Day 28
sf_glm <- glmmTMB(
prob_death28 ~ rcs(measure_value_5, 4) + (1 | hospital_id),
data   = dplyr::filter(aggregate_continuous_hospital, primary_metric == "sf"),
family = binomial(link = "logit"),
weights = n_in_group
)

tidy_fix_sf <- broom.mixed::tidy(
  sf_glm,
  effects = "fixed",
  component = "cond",
  conf.int = TRUE,
  exponentiate = TRUE
) 
tidy_fix_sf

#Visualize
grid <- aggregate_continuous_hospital |>
  filter(primary_metric=='sf') |>
  group_by(measure_value_5) |>
  summarise(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  )
predicted_sf <- as_tibble(predictions(sf_glm, new_data=grid, re.form=NA)) |>
  select(measure_value_5, n_in_group, estimate, conf.low, conf.high) |>
  group_by(measure_value_5) |>
  mutate(
    n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T)
  ) |>
  distinct()

ggplot(predicted_sf, aes(x = measure_value_5, y = estimate)) +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),
              fill = "grey80", alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(color = "firebrick2", linewidth = 1) +
  geom_point(aes(size = n_in_group), alpha = 0.6) +
  scale_size(range = c(0.5, 3), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(
    limits = c(0, 1),
    breaks = seq(0, 1, by = 0.1),
    labels = scales::label_percent(accuracy = 1)
) +
  labs(x = "SpO2/FiO2",
       y = "Predicted probability",
       title = "Predicted probability with 95% CI band") +
theme_minimal()

ggsave(
  filename='predicted_deathhospice28_sf.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))
```

```{r Function for Computing Weighted Brier Score From Summary Data}
compute_weighted_brier <- function(df, boot_n = 2000) {
  # Totals
  n_pos <- sum(df$deaths, na.rm = TRUE)
  n_neg <- sum(df$survivors, na.rm = TRUE)
  N_tot <- n_pos + n_neg
  
  if (N_tot == 0) {
    return(list(value = NA_real_, ci = c(NA_real_, NA_real_)))
  }
  
  # Point estimate (weighted over aggregated counts)
  brier_val <- (sum(df$deaths    * (1 - df$pred)^2, na.rm = TRUE) +
                  sum(df$survivors * (df$pred)^2,     na.rm = TRUE)) / N_tot
  
  # Stratified bootstrap: resample positive and negative counts across rows
  prob_pos <- if (n_pos > 0) df$deaths    / n_pos else rep(0, nrow(df))
  prob_neg <- if (n_neg > 0) df$survivors / n_neg else rep(0, nrow(df))
  
  brier_boot <- numeric(boot_n)
  for (b in seq_len(boot_n)) {
    counts_pos <- if (n_pos > 0) as.integer(stats::rmultinom(1, n_pos, prob = prob_pos)) else integer(nrow(df))
    counts_neg <- if (n_neg > 0) as.integer(stats::rmultinom(1, n_neg, prob = prob_neg)) else integer(nrow(df))
    
    brier_boot[b] <- (sum(counts_pos * (1 - df$pred)^2) +
                        sum(counts_neg * (df$pred)^2)) / N_tot
  }
  
  brier_ci <- as.numeric(stats::quantile(brier_boot, probs = c(0.025, 0.975), na.rm = TRUE))
  list(value = brier_val, ci = brier_ci)
}
```


```{r AUROC and ROC Curves}
roc_table <- data.frame()

set.seed(3982)
BOOT_NUM <- 2500 #Number of Bootstrap Replicates
#SF Ratio
dat_sf <- aggregate_continuous_hospital %>%
  filter(primary_metric=='sf') 
dat_sf <- dat_sf |>
  mutate(pred = predict(sf_glm, newdata = dat_sf, type = "response", re.form = NA),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_sf <- bind_rows(
  transmute(dat_sf, label = 1, score = pred, w = deaths),
  transmute(dat_sf, label = 0, score = pred, w = survivors)
) %>%
  filter(w > 0)

roc_sf <- roc(response = roc_df_sf$label, predictor = roc_df_sf$score, weights = roc_df_sf$w)
auc_sf <- auc(roc_sf)
ci_sf <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_sf, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_sf <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_sf, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)

roc_table <- data.frame(
  model = "Overall_SF_Ratio",
  auc = round(auc_sf, digits=3),
  ci_low = round(ci_sf[1], digits=3),
  ci_hi = round(ci_sf[3], digits=3),
  brier       = round(brier_sf$value, 3),
  brier_low   = round(brier_sf$ci[1], 3),
  brier_hi    = round(brier_sf$ci[2], 3),
  comparison = NA_character_,
  p.value = NA_real_
)

#PF Ratio
dat_pf <- aggregate_continuous_hospital %>%
  filter(primary_metric=='pf') 
dat_pf <- dat_pf |>
  mutate(pred = predict(pf_glm, newdata = dat_pf, type = "response", re.form = NULL),
         deaths = n_deathhosp28,
         survivors = n_in_group - deaths) |>
  filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

roc_df_pf <- bind_rows(
  transmute(dat_pf, label = 1, score = pred, w = deaths),
  transmute(dat_pf, label = 0, score = pred, w = survivors)
) %>%
  filter(w > 0)

roc_pf <- roc(response = roc_df_pf$label, predictor = roc_df_pf$score, weights = roc_df_pf$w)
auc_pf <- auc(roc_pf)
ci_pf <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_pf, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, stratified = TRUE))
# Weighted Brier score + 95% CI via stratified multinomial bootstrap (aggregated df)
brier_pf <- compute_weighted_brier(dat_pf, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
test <- roc.test(roc_pf, roc_sf, method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)
roc_table <- bind_rows(
  roc_table,
  data.frame(
    model = "Overall_PF_Ratio",
    auc = round(auc_pf, 3),
    ci_low = round(ci_pf[1], 3),
    ci_hi = round(ci_pf[3], 3),
    brier       = round(brier_pf$value, 3),
    brier_low   = round(brier_pf$ci[1], 3),
    brier_hi    = round(brier_pf$ci[2], 3),
    comparison = "Overall_PFvSF",
    p.value = round(test$p.value, 3)
  )
) |>
  arrange(model, comparison)
```


```{r Repeat ROC With Race}
 aggregate_continuous_race <- site_table_data$hopkins_aggregate_outcomes.csv |>
  mutate(site='hopkins') |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$rush_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'rush', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$nu_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'nu', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$umn_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'umn', site)) |>
```
