```{r Repeat ROC With Race}
  rowbind(site_table_data$michigan_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'michigan', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$penn_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'penn', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$ucmc_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'ucmc', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$emory_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'emory', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$ohsu_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'ohsu', site)) |>
  filter(!is.na(new_race_cat)) |>
  mutate(
    black=fifelse(new_race_cat=='black', 'black', 'not_black')
  ) |>
 group_by(primary_metric, site, black, measure_value_5) |>
 summarise(
   n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T), 
   n_deathhosp28=sum(n_deathhosp28, na.rm=T),
   n_deathhosp60=sum(n_deathhosp60, na.rm=T)
 ) |>
  mutate(
    prob_death28=n_deathhosp28/n_in_group,
    prob_death60=n_deathhosp60/n_in_group) |>
  ungroup()

strata  <- c("black", "not_black")
metrics <- c("sf", "pf")

glm_models <- setNames(vector("list", length(metrics)), metrics)

for (m in metrics) {
  glm_models[[m]] <- setNames(vector("list", length(strata)), strata)
  for (z in strata) {
    dat <- aggregate_continuous_race |>
      filter(primary_metric == m, black == z,
             n_in_group>0)

    if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("No rows for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    fit <- glmmTMB(
      prob_death28 ~ rcs(measure_value_5, 4),
      data   = dat,
      family = binomial(),
      weights = n_in_group
    )

    glm_models[[m]][[z]] <- fit
  }
}

set.seed(3982)
roc_models <- setNames(vector("list", length(metrics)), metrics)

for (m in metrics) {
  roc_models[[m]] <- setNames(vector("list", length(strata)), strata)
  for (z in strata) {
    this_glm <- glm_models[[m]][[z]]
    if (is.null(this_glm)) {
      warning(sprintf("No fitted model for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    # Use the same data that was used to fit
    df <- aggregate_continuous_race %>%
      filter(primary_metric == m, 
             black == z,
             n_in_group>0) |>
      mutate(
        deaths = n_deathhosp28,
        survivors = n_in_group - deaths
      )
    df$pred <-  predict(this_glm, newdata=df, type='response', re.form = NULL)

    # Drop rows with missing predictions or zero total counts
    df <- df %>% filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

    # Expand aggregated counts: one row per individual
    pos <- df %>%
      transmute(label = 1, score = pred, w = deaths) %>%
      tidyr::uncount(w)
    neg <- df %>%
      transmute(label = 0, score = pred, w = survivors) %>%
      tidyr::uncount(w)
    roc_df <- bind_rows(pos, neg)

    if (nrow(roc_df) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("No data to compute ROC for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = roc_df$label, predictor = roc_df$score, quiet = TRUE)
    auc_val <- pROC::auc(roc_obj)
    ci_val  <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_obj, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, stratified = TRUE))
    brier <- compute_weighted_brier(df, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
    # Store both the ROC object and a small summary
    roc_models[[m]][[z]] <- list(
      roc = roc_obj,
      auc = as.numeric(auc_val),
      ci  = ci_val)
    
    roc_table <- roc_table |>
      rowbind(data.frame(
        model = paste0(m, "_", z, "_subgroup"),
        auc   = round(as.numeric(auc_val), 3),
        ci_low = round(ci_val[1], 3),
        ci_hi  = round(ci_val[3], 3),
        brier       = round(brier$value, 3),
        brier_low   = round(brier$ci[1], 3),
        brier_hi    = round(brier$ci[2], 3),
        comparison = NA_character_,
        p.value    = NA_real_
      ), fill=T
    )
  }
}

#Test and Then Add Comparisons to Table
test <- roc.test(roc_models$sf$black$roc, 
                 roc_models$sf$not_black$roc,
                 method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)
#Add Data to Table
roc_table <- roc_table |>
  mutate(
    comparison=fifelse(model=='sf_black_subgroup', 'sf_black_vs_not_black', comparison),
    p.value=fifelse(model=='sf_black_subgroup', test$p.value, p.value)
    )

#Test and Then Add Comparisons to Table
test <- roc.test(roc_models$pf$black$roc, 
                 roc_models$pf$not_black$roc,
                 method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)
#Add Data to Table
roc_table <- roc_table |>
  mutate(
    comparison=fifelse(model=='pf_black_subgroup', 'pf_black_vs_not_black', comparison),
    p.value=fifelse(model=='pf_black_subgroup', test$p.value, p.value)
    )
```

```{r Repeat ROC With Respiratory Support}
aggregate_continuous_resp <- site_table_data$hopkins_aggregate_outcomes.csv |>
  mutate(site='hopkins') |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$rush_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'rush', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$nu_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'nu', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$umn_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'umn', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$michigan_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'michigan', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$penn_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'penn', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$ucmc_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'ucmc', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$emory_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'emory', site)) |>
  rowbind(site_table_data$ohsu_aggregate_outcomes.csv, fill=T) |>
  mutate(site=fifelse(is.na(site), 'ohsu', site)) |>
  filter(!is.na(resp_support_category)) |>
  mutate(
    resp_support_category=fifelse(resp_support_category=='cpap', 'nippv', resp_support_category)
  ) |>
 group_by(primary_metric, site, resp_support_category, measure_value_5) |>
 summarise(
   n_in_group=sum(n_in_group, na.rm=T), 
   n_deathhosp28=sum(n_deathhosp28, na.rm=T),
   n_deathhosp60=sum(n_deathhosp60, na.rm=T)
 ) |>
  mutate(
    prob_death28=n_deathhosp28/n_in_group,
    prob_death60=n_deathhosp60/n_in_group) |>
  ungroup()

strata  <- c("nippv", "high_flow_nc", "imv")
metrics <- c("sf", "pf")

glm_models <- setNames(vector("list", length(metrics)), metrics)

for (m in metrics) {
  glm_models[[m]] <- setNames(vector("list", length(strata)), strata)
  for (z in strata) {
    dat <- aggregate_continuous_resp %>%
      filter(primary_metric == m, resp_support_category == z,
             n_in_group>0)

    if (nrow(dat) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("No rows for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    fit <- glmmTMB(
      prob_death28 ~ rcs(measure_value_5, 4) + (1 | site),
      data   = dat,
      family = binomial(),
      weights = n_in_group
    )

    glm_models[[m]][[z]] <- fit
  }
}

set.seed(3982)
if (!exists("roc_models") || is.null(roc_models)) roc_models <- list()

for (m in metrics) {
  if (is.null(roc_models[[m]])) roc_models[[m]] <- list()
  for (z in strata) {
    this_glm <- glm_models[[m]][[z]]
    if (is.null(this_glm)) {
      warning(sprintf("No fitted model for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    # Use the same data that was used to fit
    df <- aggregate_continuous_resp %>%
      filter(primary_metric == m, resp_support_category == z,
             n_in_group>0) %>%
      mutate(
        deaths = n_deathhosp28,
        survivors = n_in_group - deaths
      )
    df$pred <- predict(this_glm, newdata = df, type = "response", re.form=NULL)

    # Drop rows with missing predictions or zero total counts
    df <- df %>% filter(!is.na(pred), (deaths + survivors) > 0)

    # Expand aggregated counts: one row per individual
    pos <- df %>%
      transmute(label = 1, score = pred, w = deaths) %>%
      tidyr::uncount(w)
    neg <- df %>%
      transmute(label = 0, score = pred, w = survivors) %>%
      tidyr::uncount(w)
    roc_df <- bind_rows(pos, neg)

    if (nrow(roc_df) == 0) {
      warning(sprintf("No data to compute ROC for metric '%s' and stratum '%s'; skipping.", m, z))
      next
    }

    roc_obj <- pROC::roc(response = roc_df$label, predictor = roc_df$score, quiet = TRUE)
    auc_val <- pROC::auc(roc_obj)
    ci_val  <- as.numeric(pROC::ci.auc(roc_obj, method = "bootstrap", boot.n = BOOT_NUM, stratified = TRUE))
    brier <- compute_weighted_brier(df, boot_n = BOOT_NUM)
    # Store both the ROC object and a small summary
    roc_models[[m]][[z]] <- list(
      roc = roc_obj,
      auc = as.numeric(auc_val),
      ci  = ci_val)
    
    roc_table <- roc_table |>
      rowbind(data.frame(
        model = paste0(m, "_", z, "_subgroup"),
        auc   = round(as.numeric(auc_val), 3),
        ci_low = round(ci_val[1], 3),
        ci_hi  = round(ci_val[3], 3),
        brier       = round(brier$value, 3),
        brier_low   = round(brier$ci[1], 3),
        brier_hi    = round(brier$ci[2], 3),
        comparison = NA_character_,
        p.value    = NA_real_
      ), fill=T
    )
  }
}

#Test and Then Add Comparisons to Table - Use IMV as Reference
#First for SF
test <- roc.test(roc_models$sf$imv$roc, 
                 roc_models$sf$nippv$roc,
                 method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)
#Add Data to Table
roc_table <- roc_table |>
  mutate(
    comparison=fifelse(model=='sf_imv_subgroup', 'sf_imv_vs_nippv_hifnc', comparison),
    p.value=fifelse(model=='sf_imv_subgroup', NA_real_, p.value),
    comparison=fifelse(model=='sf_nippv_subgroup', 'sf_imv_vs_nippv_hifnc', comparison),
    p.value=fifelse(model=='sf_nippv_subgroup', test$p.value, p.value)
    )

test <- roc.test(roc_models$sf$imv$roc, 
                 roc_models$sf$high_flow_nc$roc,
                 method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

#Add Data to Table
roc_table <- roc_table |>
  mutate(
    comparison=fifelse(model=='sf_high_flow_nc_subgroup', 'sf_imv_vs_nippv_hifnc', comparison),
    p.value=fifelse(model=='sf_high_flow_nc_subgroup', test$p.value, p.value)
    )

#NOw for PF
#Test and Then Add Comparisons to Table - Use IMV as Reference
#First for SF
test <- roc.test(roc_models$pf$imv$roc, 
                 roc_models$pf$nippv$roc,
                 method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)
#Add Data to Table
roc_table <- roc_table |>
  mutate(
    comparison=fifelse(model=='pf_imv_subgroup', 'pf_imv_vs_nippv_hifnc', comparison),
    p.value=fifelse(model=='pf_imv_subgroup', NA_real_, p.value),
    comparison=fifelse(model=='pf_nippv_subgroup', 'pf_imv_vs_nippv_hifnc', comparison),
    p.value=fifelse(model=='pf_nippv_subgroup', test$p.value, p.value)
    )

test <- roc.test(roc_models$pf$imv$roc, 
                 roc_models$pf$high_flow_nc$roc,
                 method='bootstrap', boot.n=BOOT_NUM)

#Add Data to Table
roc_table <- roc_table |>
  mutate(
    comparison=fifelse(model=='pf_high_flow_nc_subgroup', 'pf_imv_vs_nippv_hifnc', comparison),
    p.value=fifelse(model=='pf_high_flow_nc_subgroup', test$p.value, p.value)
    )

write_csv(roc_table, file=paste0(project_location, '/tables/roc_table_summary.csv'))
```


```{r Plot Curves}
overall_roc_curve <- list('PaO2/FiO2'= roc_pf, 'SpO2/FiO2'= roc_sf)
ggroc(overall_roc_curve) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_brewer(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_overall.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

race_stratified_roc <- list(
  'Black-S/F'=roc_models$sf$black$roc, 
  'Non-Black-S/F'=roc_models$sf$not_black$roc,
  'Black-P/F'=roc_models$pf$black$roc,
  'Non-Black-P/F'=roc_models$pf$not_black$roc
)
ggroc(race_stratified_roc) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_race.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

resp_stratified_roc_sf <- list(
  'IMV-S/F'=roc_models$sf$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-S/F'=roc_models$sf$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-S/F'=roc_models$sf$high_flow_nc$roc)
ggroc(resp_stratified_roc_sf) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_resp_support_sf.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

resp_stratified_roc_pf <- list(
  'IMV-P/F'=roc_models$pf$imv$roc, 
  'NIPPV-P/F'=roc_models$pf$nippv$roc,
  'HIFNC-P/F'=roc_models$pf$high_flow_nc$roc)
ggroc(resp_stratified_roc_pf) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 1, linetype = "dashed") +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_color_viridis_d(name="") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='roc_resp_support_pf.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

```





```{r Calibration Curves}
N_BINS <- 18

#PF Ratio
cal_bin <- dat_pf %>%
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred, N_BINS)) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(cal_bin, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate)) +
  geom_smooth(color="firebrick2", se=F) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.015) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Mean predicted probability (bin)",
       y = "Observed Event Probability",
       title = "Calibration plot for PaO2/FiO2 (binned deciles)") +
  theme_minimal()

agg_df <- dat_pf |>
  group_by(measure_value_5) |>
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(agg_df, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate, weight = total)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=total), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 1.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 0.5), ylim = c(0, 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Predicted probability (Death/Hospice at Day 28)",
       y = "Observed Probability",
       title = "Calibration: PaO2/FiO2") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='calibration_pf_overall.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

#SF Ratio
cal_bin <- dat_sf %>%
  mutate(bin = ntile(pred, N_BINS)) %>%
  group_by(bin) %>%
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(cal_bin, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate)) +
  geom_smooth(color="firebrick2", se=F) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_low, ymax = ci_high), width = 0.015) +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_x_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits=c(0.1,0.5)) +
  coord_equal() +
  labs(x = "Mean predicted probability (bin)",
       y = "Observed Event Probability",
       title = "Calibration plot for SpO2/FiO2 (binned deciles)") +
  theme_minimal()

agg_df <- dat_sf |>
  group_by(measure_value_5) |>
  summarise(
    pred_mean = weighted.mean(pred, n_in_group),
    events = sum(deaths),
    total = sum(n_in_group),
    obs_rate = events / total,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(
    ci_low = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$lower,
    ci_high = binom::binom.confint(events, total, method = "wilson")$upper
  ) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(agg_df, aes(x = pred_mean, y = obs_rate, weight = total)) +
  geom_point(aes(size=total), alpha = 0.3) +
  geom_smooth(method = "loess", formula = y ~ x, se = TRUE, color = "dodgerblue4") +
  geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  scale_size(range = c(0.25, 1.75), guide = "none") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::label_percent()) +
  coord_equal(xlim = c(0, 0.5), ylim = c(0, 0.5)) +
  labs(x = "Predicted probability (Death/Hospice at Day 28)",
       y = "Observed Probability",
       title = "Calibration: SpO2/FiO2") +
  theme_minimal()
ggsave(
  filename='calibration_sf_overall.pdf',
  plot=last_plot(),
  path = paste0(project_location, '/graphs/'))

```
